sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72620" key="oi)ope/dh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰο-πέδη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, perh. (from <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">οἶς</foreign>) a <sense id="n72620.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">woollen bandage for sore feet,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.401</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Crin.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
